positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a group of diverse forest animals (e.g., fox, owl, deer, bear) gathered in a circular, harmonious arrangement. The animals are depicted in mid-action, interacting joyfully with oversized, fantastical flora (glowing mushrooms, vibrant fern leaves, cosmic vines). The scene uses bold, complementary colors (deep sapphire, emerald green, rich burnt orange) against a muted, ethereal background. Style: Highly detailed, whimsical Storybook Art mixed with clean, modern vector aesthetics. Composition: Central focus, clean silhouettes suitable for repeating pattern or singular large graphic. Lighting: Soft, atmospheric glowing light emanating from the flora, creating high contrast and depth. Suitable for direct screen printing on natural fabric.
negative: blurry, noisy, low contrast, text, watermark, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poor drawing, grayscale, sepia, realistic photo
